---
title: "Announcement about MAD213 Basic Statistics on October 30" 
description: "Postpone"
date: 2020-10-28T08:01:00-03:00
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float:
        collapsed: true
        smooth_scroll: true
    toc_depth: 3
    fig_caption: yes
    code_folding: show
    number_sections: true

fontsize: 14pt
tags: []
comments: false
---

`r emo::ji("loudspeaker")` MAD213 - Basic Statistics lecture on October 30, 2020 is postponed to November 6, 2020.

`r emo::ji("sun")` GERTUNC `r emo::ji("bar_chart")`
